case_title: THREDUP, INC. VS. JOSEPH'S PLACE, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF THREDUP, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT JOSEPH'S PLACE, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THREDUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH'S PLACE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF THREDUP, INC.
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-17-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF THREDUP INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHIA COLLINS. DEFENDANT JOSEPH'S PLACE INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AFSANEN (ANGELA) ABAIAN. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH THE ASSISTANCE OF THE MEDIATORS. APPEARANCE AT THE APR-17-2019 IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARNACE AT THE NEXT HEARING THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT SITH SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER 3-11-19 ORDER. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $79.00 SERVED JAN-17-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH'S PLACE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-11-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
